sourceMovie.title: Black Adam
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Black Adam (2022) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Jaume Collet-Serra's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Black Adam clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Black Adam clicked for you, Captain America: Civil War (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Black Adam?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Captain America: Civil War, Black Panther—each shares DNA with Black Adam while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Black Adam?
faq.answer: Black Adam (2022) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Black Adam worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
